creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 178603
patch

The attached patch:
1) updates the port to revision 6007,
2) fixes MASTER_SITES for XXX pack and removes my domain (the files are available again on the official website),
3) fixes LICENSE - the port is actually double-licensed,
4) removes workaround for 9.x (CFLAGS+=-flax-vector-conversions),
5) removes now unnecessary patches.

The port builds fine on 10.3 on Poudriere.
